articles.summary: A look at the Vatican's unprecedented alliance with Silicon Valley, the challenges of adopting agentic AI, and the chaos caused by AI agents in the tech world

articles.title: Today's Tech Brief: The Pope, AI, and a Dash of Irony
articles.summary: The Pope's recent encyclical on artificial intelligence has raised eyebrows, with some parts seemingly written by AI itself. I'm diving into the story, exploring the Vatican's unexpected alliance with Silicon Valley, and what this means for the power of AI.
articles.imageAlt: Image from theverge.com for Did the Pope use AI to write about the dangers of AI?
